sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67095" key="mete/mbasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετέμ-βᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">transition</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐκ τῶν ζῳδίων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:336:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">336.20</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
